message:
Add infrastructure smoke test and update E2E test module

Add rch-common/tests/smoke.rs (bd-2val):
- Quick validation test for E2E infrastructure components
- Validates test environment configuration before full suite
- Tests SSH connectivity, config loading, and fixture access
- Enables CI fast-fail on infrastructure problems

Update tests/true_e2e/mod.rs:
- Register new test modules for improved organization

Update .beads/issues.jsonl:
- Track progress on E2E testing infrastructure beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
